inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Athlete's age in years for normative reference (optional)

businessContext_i18n.en: Athlete's age in years for normative reference (optional)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Normatif referans için sporcunun yaşı (yıl cinsinden, isteğe bağlı)
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter des Athleten in Jahren für normative Referenz (optional)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge de l'athlète en années pour référence normative (optionnel)

inputs.label: Gender
inputs.businessContext: 0 for female, 1 for male. Used for normative classification if implemented.

businessContext_i18n.en: 0 for female, 1 for male. Used for normative classification if implemented.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kadın için 0, erkek için 1. Uygulanıyorsa normatif sınıflandırma için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: 0 für weiblich, 1 für männlich. Wird für normative Klassifikation verwendet, falls implementiert.
businessContext_i18n.fr: 0 pour femme, 1 pour homme. Utilisé pour la classification normative si implémenté.

inputs.label: Distance in 12 minutes
inputs.businessContext: Total distance covered during a 12-minute run (Cooper test).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total distance covered during a 12-minute run (Cooper test).
businessContext_i18n.tr: 12 dakikalık koşu (Cooper testi) sırasında kat edilen toplam mesafe.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte zurückgelegte Strecke während eines 12-minütigen Laufs (Cooper-Test).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance totale parcourue lors d'une course de 12 minutes (test de Cooper).

inputs.label: Body Weight
inputs.businessContext: Athlete's body weight in kilograms, used to compute absolute VO2 max.

businessContext_i18n.en: Athlete's body weight in kilograms, used to compute absolute VO2 max.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sporcunun kilogram cinsinden vücut ağırlığı, mutlak VO2 max hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Körpergewicht des Athleten in Kilogramm, zur Berechnung der absoluten VO2max.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids corporel de l'athlète en kilogrammes, utilisé pour calculer la VO2 max absolue.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
